Consider f: ℝ → ℝ defined as f(x) = { c₁eˣ - c₂ln(1/x) if x > 0, 3 otherwise } where c₁,c₂∈ℝ. If f is continuous at x=0, then c₁ + c₂ = ______. (answer in integer)

text: Let X be a random variable taking values in {1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8}. Pr(X=1)=Pr(X=2)=Pr(X=5)=Pr(X=7)=1/6 and Pr(X=3)=Pr(X=4)=Pr(X=6)=Pr(X=8)=1/12. The expected value E[X] is equal to ________. (rounded off to two decimal places)
